user.title: Select a thermostat
user.description: Choose the thermostat you want to control.

data.call_for_heat_enabled: Allow thermostat to Call for Heat

data_description.call_for_heat_enabled: This setting can be changed by visiting the Device Info page in Devices & Services
data_description.track_on_device_changes: If enabled, thermostat changes made outside Home Assistant (device schedule, physical controls, or the vendor app) during a boost are overridden to keep the boost active. The most recent on-device change is saved and restored when the boost ends. Useful for devices with built-in schedules such as Nest.
